description: Style Note When you wear buckaroo shoes, you are making a style statement that is immediately identifiable and extremely trendy. With Mexican Cowboy roots, these shoes crafted from pure and high quality leather are comfortable and extremely sought after. Make the style statement that will leave a mark with this pair of shoes. Product Details Blunt toed, brown shoes with central lace up fastening and a stacked heel Leather upper with branding at the side Reinforced overlay at the heel collar Fabric inner with a soft footbed and padded tongue Upper stitched to the outsole Tough rubber outsole with grooves for better grip Material and Care Leather Wipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dust and dirt Use a branded leather conditioner to maintain shoe shine
